summary: Made two surgical seam edits: the opening now picks up the prior chapter's final doorstep beat at Blue Hour, and the closing now carries Warehouse Nine's bleach-stink aftermath into the post-dawn state that opens the next chapter.
edits: Anchored the first paragraph to the courier exchange from Chapter 8 so Chapter 9 enters on the same immediate aftermath.
Added a brief post-dawn residue bridge near the ending to support Chapter 10's morning-after opening.
Confirmed the current opening remains structurally distinct from the visible adjacent opening in the boundary context, so no opening rebuild was needed.
